narratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन इस मामले में पूरी तरह से पश्चिमी देशों पर निर्भर है
narratives.reasoning: The statement directly undermines Ukraine's self-sufficiency and portrays it as entirely dependent on Western countries, which fits the definition of discrediting its capabilities and legitimacy as a nation.

narratives.evidence_quote: आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ
narratives.reasoning: This quote explicitly criticizes and diminishes the effectiveness of Western and European sanctions, portraying their diplomatic and economic efforts as a failure.

narratives.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narratives.evidence_quote: यूरोपीय देशों के रूसी एनर्जी पर निर्भरता ने यूरोपीय देशों को बड़ा झटका दिया
narratives.reasoning: The text highlights a specific adverse outcome (energy crisis) for European countries as a direct consequence of the war and their own policies, fitting the narrative of negative consequences for the West.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Ukraine is a puppet of the West
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन इस मामले में पूरी तरह से पश्चिमी देशों पर निर्भर है
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement directly claims that Ukraine is completely dependent on Western countries for military equipment, framing it as a client state without autonomy, which aligns with the 'puppet of the West' subnarrative.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian government and officials and policies
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन में मिलिट्री इक्वीपमेंट्स की खरीद-फरोख्त में बड़ी धांधली हुई है... यूक्रेन को भी भ्रष्टाचार के जांच को लेकर मिलिट्री अधिकारियों के देश छोड़ने पर रोक लगानी पड़ी।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote alleges large-scale corruption and irregularities in military procurement within Ukraine, directly seeking to delegitimize the government and its officials by portraying them as corrupt.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: इस बीच अमेरिका भी अपने हाथ खड़े करते नजर आया लेकिन यूक्रेन अब भी मदद की उम्मीद लगाए हुआ है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement portrays Ukraine as passively and hopelessly waiting for Western aid that is not forthcoming, undermining its agency and resilience. It supports the parent narrative of discrediting Ukraine but does not fit neatly into the more specific subnarrative definitions provided.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West is weak
subnarratives.evidence_quote: हालांकि, फिर भी वे व्लादिमीर पुतिन को रोक पाने में विफल रहे और आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly states that Western and European sanctions have failed to stop Putin and have had little effect on Russia, presenting the West's primary punitive tool as ineffective and thus portraying the West as weak and non-potent.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The EU is divided
subnarratives.evidence_quote: मसलन, शुरुआती दौर में देखा गया कि कई यूरोपीय देशों ने रूस पर दबाव बनाने के नजरिए से पश्चिमी खेमे में चले गए लेकिन तुरंत ही उन्हें ऊर्जा संकट ने घेर लिया।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote highlights that European countries initially joined the Western bloc to pressure Russia but were immediately hit by an energy crisis, implying their actions were not unified or sustainable due to differing vulnerabilities and interests, thus presenting the EU as a set of divided entities.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस ने जब यूक्रेन पर हमले किए, तो पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय देशों में एक आत्ममुग्धता का भाव था, जिससे वे यह समझकर चल रहे थे कि पूरी दुनिया पुतिन पर दबाव बनाने में पश्चिम का साथ देंगी, लेकिन ऐसा नहीं हुआ।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote supports the parent narrative by discrediting the West's diplomatic assumptions and global influence, claiming the West was self-absorbed and mistaken in believing the world would follow its lead against Putin. This argument undermines Western diplomatic credibility but does not fit neatly into the more specific subnarrative definitions provided.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Sanctions imposed by Western countries will backfire
subnarratives.evidence_quote: हालांकि, फिर भी वे व्लादिमीर पुतिन को रोक पाने में विफल रहे और आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement directly claims that Western and European sanctions have failed to stop Putin and have had little effect on Russia, which is a classic example of arguing that sanctions have backfired or been ineffective, thus highlighting negative consequences for the West's policy.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस यूक्रेन युद्ध की वजह से 2022 में यूरोप में ऊर्जा संकट पैदा हुई... यूरोपीय देशों के रूसी एनर्जी पर निर्भरता ने यूरोपीय देशों को बड़ा झटका दिया।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote describes a specific negative consequence for Europe (an energy crisis) caused by the conflict and Europe's own dependence on Russia, which supports the parent narrative of negative consequences for the West but does not fit the 'sanctions backfire' or 'refugee flows' definitions.
